courses.name: Discover Scuba Diving
courses.description: First-time dive experience for people with no prior scuba background. One day at the dive center: briefing, gear intro, 4 basic skills in shallow water, then a dive to 12m. Optional second dive same day for 1,000 THB extra. Personal instructor throughout.

courses.name: Bubble Maker
courses.description: Kids' introductory scuba experience. Safe, fun pool-based intro to breathing underwater.

courses.name: Scuba Review
courses.description: Refresher for certified divers who haven't been in the water for 6+ months. Quick knowledge check, skill refresh, then 2 fun open-water dives with an instructor.

courses.name: Open Water Diver
courses.description: Entry-level PADI certification, valid for life, recognized worldwide. Theory, pool session, 4 open-water dives to 18m. 2 nights on-site accommodation included. Max 6 students per instructor.

courses.name: Advanced Open Water
courses.description: Second PADI cert. 100% practical, no exams. 5 specialty dives: Deep (30m), Wreck, Night, Buoyancy or Photography, Navigation. 1 night accommodation included. Max 4 students per instructor.
courses.special_offer: 5% discount if continuing directly to Rescue Diver

courses.name: Rescue Diver
courses.prerequisite: Advanced Open Water + valid EFR (First Aid/CPR) within last 12 months
courses.description: Focus on self-rescue, managing diver stress, search patterns, and surfacing an unconscious diver. 10 rescue exercises plus 2 realistic open-water scenarios. EFR can be skipped if customer already has valid EFR within the last 12 months.
courses.note: EFR add-on listed in CoursesSection at 4,500 THB; a separate copy in CourseDetailDialog lists 4,000 THB. Authoritative value here matches SOUL.md: 4,500 THB.

courses.name: Emergency First Response (EFR)
courses.description: CPR and first-aid certification. International cert, valid 24 months. Prerequisite for Rescue Diver unless already held within last 12 months.

courses.name: Peak Performance Buoyancy
courses.description: PADI specialty focused on buoyancy mastery: weighting, trim, hovering, air consumption.

courses.name: Wreck Diving
courses.description: PADI wreck specialty including limited penetration.

courses.name: Deep Diving
courses.description: PADI deep specialty beyond 18m, gas management, deep dive planning.

courses.name: Underwater Scooter (DPV)
courses._needs_update: DPV price not published on website; contact for pricing.

courses.name: Sidemount Diving
courses._needs_update: Sidemount price not published on website; contact for pricing.
courses.description: Sidemount configuration specialty: streamlined profile, independent gas supply.

courses.name: UW Photography & Videography
courses.description: Extended PADI Digital UW Photographer & Videographer. 10 dives dedicated to photography, one-on-one instruction, full access to pro gear (DSLR / TG6 / strobes), editing with Luminar Neo / Lightroom.

courses.name: Divemaster
courses.description: First professional PADI level. Internship-style program. Duration depends on progress. Free stay + free fun diving during training.

courses.name: IDC (Instructor Development Course)
courses.price_note: Around 100k THB, varies by date and currency. Contact for current pricing.
courses.prerequisite: PADI Divemaster, 100+ logged dives recommended, EFR within 24 months
courses.description: 2-week Instructor Development Course ending just before monthly PADI Instructor Examination on Koh Tao. Focus on realistic teaching, not just exam prep. Free dive theory refresher before IDC starts.

includes: Thai buffet lunch on the boat
3 dives (2 at Sail Rock, 1 at Shark Island)
sail_rock.notes: Best dive site in the Gulf of Thailand. Open-ocean pinnacle between Koh Tao and Koh Phangan, rises 15m above surface, drops to 40m. Seasonal whale shark sightings. Famous for The Chimney swim-through (18m to 5m) and dense schools of barracuda, trevally, batfish.

accommodation.description: On-site accommodation at the dive center in Sairee Beach.
accommodation._needs_update: Specific room tiers, occupancy, and per-night pricing for non-course stays are not published on the website. Confirm with Ben.

idc_dates._needs_update: Dates pulled from CourseDetailDialog 2026 schedule; confirm year and any updates for 2027.

food_recommendations.name: 995 Roasted Duck
food_recommendations.notes: Well-known roasted duck and rice spot, local favorite.

food_recommendations.name: Barracuda Restaurant
food_recommendations.notes: Popular sit-down dinner spot on Koh Tao.

food_recommendations.name: Pranee's Kitchen
food_recommendations.notes: Classic Thai, long-running local spot near the pier.

food_recommendations.name: Whitening
food_recommendations.notes: Beachfront dinner and drinks, good for sunset.

food_recommendations._needs_update: Food recommendations are general Koh Tao picks, not curated by Siam Scuba. Ben should confirm or replace with current personal picks.

dive_sites.name: Sail Rock
dive_sites.location: Between Koh Tao and Koh Phangan (open ocean pinnacle)
highlights: dense schools of chevron barracuda, trevally, batfish
dive_sites.description: Best dive site in the Gulf of Thailand. Open-ocean granite pinnacle, reached on the dedicated Sail Rock day trip every 3 days.

dive_sites.name: Chumphon Pinnacle
dive_sites.description: Cluster of submerged granite peaks dropping to 35m. Famous for pelagic life. Currents can be strong.

dive_sites.name: Japanese Gardens
dive_sites.location: Between Koh Tao and Koh Nang Yuan
dive_sites.level: All levels, great for beginners and snorkelling
dive_sites.description: Shallow, sheltered coral garden. Common Open Water training site.

dive_sites.name: Shark Island
dive_sites.description: Bonus site paired with the Sail Rock day trip (3rd dive of the day).

dive_sites.name: White Rock
dive_sites.description: One of the most visited sites on Koh Tao. Large enough for a full 50-minute dive without repeating ground.

dive_sites.name: Twins / Twin Peaks
dive_sites.description: Two rocky pinnacles close together, popular for Open Water course dives.

dive_sites.name: Southwest Pinnacle (SW Pinnacle)
dive_sites.description: Deeper pinnacle dive, similar profile to Chumphon. Often paired with morning fun dives.

seasonal: whale sharks (Sail Rock and Chumphon Pinnacle, seasonal)
not_present: reef sharks (none on local Koh Tao sites)
marine_life_notes.coral_status: Recovering thanks to ongoing conservation efforts; not pristine but actively regrowing.

getting_here.island: Koh Tao, Surat Thani province, Thailand

nearest_airports.name: Koh Samui (USM)
nearest_airports.notes: Closest airport, then ferry to Koh Tao (~1.5-2h by Lomprayah)

nearest_airports.name: Surat Thani (URT)
nearest_airports.notes: Cheaper flights, then bus + ferry combo

nearest_airports.name: Chumphon (CJM)
nearest_airports.notes: Small airport on the mainland, then Lomprayah or Songserm ferry (~1.5-2h)

nearest_airports.name: Bangkok (BKK / DMK)
nearest_airports.notes: Overnight bus/train to Chumphon, then ferry

ferry_operators.name: Lomprayah
routes: Koh Samui / Koh Phangan <-> Koh Tao

ferry_operators.name: Seatran Discovery
routes: Koh Samui / Koh Phangan <-> Koh Tao

getting_here.dive_center_location: Sairee Beach (short taxi or songthaew from Mae Haad pier, ~5-10 min)
getting_here._needs_update: Ferry schedules and prices change; bot should direct customers to the operators' official websites for live times. Content here is for general orientation only.
